resources.name: SCEP SPEC-008 Automated Acceptance
resources.description: Automated Telemetry acceptance. Run every request in numeric order with the Insomnia Collection Runner.

resources.name: SPEC-008 Automated Telemetry
resources.description: Run all requests in numeric order. The flow prepares an owned ACTIVE session, validates single and batch ingestion, deterministic idempotency, atomic rollback, authorization concealment, temporal rules, delayed ingestion, OpenAPI, and metrics.

resources.name: 01 - Login Administrator and Initialize Run
02 - Create Facility
03 - Create Station and Connector
04 - Create EV Driver
resources.afterResponseScript: insomnia.test('driver creation returns 201', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(201));

resources.name: 05 - Login EV Driver
06 - Create Unrelated EV Driver
resources.afterResponseScript: insomnia.test('outsider creation returns 201', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(201));

resources.name: 07 - Login Unrelated EV Driver
08 - Create Owned Vehicle
09 - Create Eligible Reservation
10 - Activate Charging Session and Derive Observation Times
11 - Reject Missing Bearer Authentication
resources.afterResponseScript: insomnia.test('missing authentication returns 401', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(401));

resources.name: 12 - Ingest Single Sample
13 - Retry Identical Single Sample
14 - Reject Conflicting Single Idempotency Key
15 - Ingest New Batch with In-Request Duplicate
16 - Retry Fully Persisted Batch
17 - Ingest Mixed New and Persisted Batch
18 - Reject Batch Conflict Atomically
resources.afterResponseScript: insomnia.test('conflicting batch returns 409', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(409));

resources.name: 19 - Reject Sample without Measurements
resources.afterResponseScript: insomnia.test('empty observation returns 422', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(422));

resources.name: 20 - Reject Measurement outside Range
resources.afterResponseScript: insomnia.test('out-of-range measurement returns 422', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(422));

resources.name: 21 - Reject Observation before Session Start
resources.afterResponseScript: insomnia.test('observation before start returns 422', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(422));

resources.name: 22 - Reject ACTIVE Observation outside Clock Skew
resources.afterResponseScript: insomnia.test('observation outside five-minute skew returns 422', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(422));

resources.name: 23 - List, Filter, Order, and Verify Batch Rollback
24 - Filter Telemetry by Source
25 - Retrieve Telemetry Sample
26 - Conceal Session Telemetry from Unrelated Driver
resources.afterResponseScript: insomnia.test('invisible session telemetry returns 404', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(404));

resources.name: 27 - Conceal Telemetry Sample from Unrelated Driver
resources.afterResponseScript: insomnia.test('invisible telemetry sample returns 404', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(404));

resources.name: 28 - Complete Charging Session
29 - Accept Delayed Telemetry for Completed Session
resources.afterResponseScript: insomnia.test('delayed valid observation returns 201', () => insomnia.expect(insomnia.response.code).to.eql(201));

resources.name: 30 - Verify Telemetry OpenAPI Contract
31 - Verify SPEC-008 Metrics
